title: Morphology candidate lattice (P2b deliverable A)
description: The per-token ranked morphology candidate lattice for the general Fusha checker. Disambiguation is RANKING over a kept candidate set (analyze-then-rank — CAMeL Tools / MADAMIRA / CALIMA-Star), NEVER a single forced parse for unvoweled Arabic. Each candidate carries TWO distinct ordering fields (score AND rank) and never a boolean 'correct'. The lattice CONSUMES the clitic segment_candidates (segment_candidate_ref points back at a row) and never rebuilds a segmentation. root/lemma/pattern are AUTHORED or null — never paraphrase-laundered. Deep per-candidate validation is delegated to tools/validate_fusha_text_check.py (the repo mini-validator does not resolve $ref); this schema is the structural contract + the closed enums. Dry-run; source-clean. parserplans/general-fusha-grammar-checker-p2b-learning-cefr/001.

token_ref.description: tok:N index ref of the analyzed token.

candidates.description: All competing out-of-context morphological readings, kept (never collapsed). >=1 always.

top_rank.description: The rank value of the top candidate (1).

all_unvoweled_kept.description: Invariant: an unvoweled token's full reading set is kept, never pruned to one.

lemma.description: Authored, or null. Never paraphrase-laundered from an external lexicon.

root.description: Authored triliteral/quadriliteral, or null when not determinable without analysis. May be populated from a user-supplied local QAC export (an occurrence-level FACT) via tools/qac_adapter.py — see informed_by.

informed_by.description: INTERNAL provenance breadcrumb only (source-boundaries §2): which corpus a FACT (e.g. root) was confirmed against. Carries no external text. Present only when an optional user-supplied QAC adapter confirmed a fact; absent/null otherwise. MUST be stripped before any public artifact.

pos.description: Coarse part-of-speech (a SUBSET of the morphosyntax-token pos enum; closed).

features.description: Maps 1:1 onto morphosyntax-token sarf{}. KEYS are CLOSED (the validator FAILs an off-set key). Values are strings/null; an absent diacritic leaves a feature unset (ambiguity, never error).

ambiguity_reason.description: WHY this stays a candidate (unvoweled, homograph, weak-root, component-only). Source-clean; scanned for leaks.

rank.description: 1 = top. STORED SEPARATELY from score; never a boolean 'correct'.

score.description: Additive per-feature score; NOT a boolean. Two distinct fields (score + rank) required.

segment_candidate_ref.description: Integer index into the token's segment_candidates this reading assumes. Must index a real row.
